name: warden
description: Centralized voice control for nuthouse plugins in Codex: decorative persona-line dispatch plus a global on/off toggle.

interface.longDescription: Warden provides Codex with the nuthouse voice gate: a global on/off toggle for decorative persona lines and a strict JSON dispatcher mode that other plugins can call without making voice a workflow precondition.
defaultPrompt: Use Warden to check whether nuthouse fun messages are enabled.
Use Warden to silence nuthouse persona lines globally.
